title: RunPod remote live-verification checklist
description: Promoted from MPI-64 at close (2026-06-15). Verification-ONLY residue: code is shipped + committed; each item just needs a live Pod to confirm + tick. (M4) cancel/interrupt a remote gen mid-run; (M5) higher-res/longer T2V on a 64GB+ Pod (confirms RAM-wall advice clears on big Pods); (A3) OOM-toast live-verify — the comfy_not_ready soft-503 toast + status-bar auto-repaint on a real container-OOM self-recovery (code committed 31eb419/12992c3; the weak test GPU was reclaimed before verify); (F8) crash-watchdog backstop — simulated-crash -> wrapper ~15min idle-watchdog self-stop (delete-on-quit half already PASS); (G5) Step 4.3.1 volume-delete-with-attached-Pod (delete attached Pod first, then volume; both gone, no 'attached' error). No code to write — run on the next live Pod and tick. See brief.md. App-side / verify.
